---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should `reportilo` help users do?

## Use Case

Who needs this, and in which workflow?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior, inputs, outputs, and affected surface.

## Surface

- [ ] R package
- [ ] Bundled Shiny app
- [ ] Browser app
- [ ] Data pipeline or bundled data
- [ ] Documentation or website

## Data or Guideline Sources

If this request involves guideline text, checklist items, flow diagrams, or
risk-of-bias tools, include source links and any known reuse terms.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or different design you considered.
